results.title: Data protection laws in India - Data Protection Laws of the World
results.snippet: Scope and applicability. The DPDP Act pertains to the processing of digital personal data within India, encompassing situations where the personal data is either (i) collected in a digital form or (ii) collected in a non-digitized form and subsequently converted into digital form.
